title: What it means when a feature is “On roadmap ”
excerpt:
Congratulations! When features are marked as “On The Roadmap” it means that our development team is already working on bringing this idea to life and we expect this feature to be live soon! 
Your voice helps guide our fu…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Congratulations! When features are marked as “On The Roadmap” it means that our development team is already working on bringing this idea to life and we expect this feature to be live soon!

Your voice helps guide our future decisions and so keep voting and submitting requests. To learn more about the feature request process, how it works, and how to become part of the magic read here.

posts.author: nathanru (Nathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julietteb

Do you have an update? Any idea when this will be live? Sending a link instead of the actual attachment isn’t a good solution, especially if you send it to someone outside your organisation.

posts.author: rossevotix (Ross)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Is there an update to this it has been 8 months since it moved to on the roadmap.

I simply need the start time / end time to pull through so I can effectivley see time spent via outlook in Monday.com

I have been able to use this to get the hours correctly
round((TIMEVALUE({End Date})-TIMEVALUE({Start Date}))*24,1)

However for recurring meetings, it pulls through the start date and end date of when the recurrance started not the start and end date of the meeting.

posts.author: Dean-Fowler (Dean Fowler)
posts.cookedHtml: Fully agree, Hoping this feature is comming soon.

posts.author: dlemor (Daniel Lemor)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates? Seems like this has been “coming soon” for almost a year now…

posts.author: Equinox (Hugues)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julietteb

Do you have any updates ?

posts.author: AMelvin (Ashley Melvin)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been an update for this feature?

posts.author: Terry.Heard (Terry Heard)
posts.cookedHtml: Still hoping and waiting for an update on the “On The RoadMap” item for Start and Stop times for the date column. I have asked previously. Still waiting on a response
